_comment: Tier-2 for NGSolve helmholtz#0: complex=True required on FESpace for Helmholtz forms with complex coefficients (absorbing BC, PML, time-harmonic source). Adding a 1j*k*u*v*dx integrator to a BilinearForm on a real H1 space raises NgException 'real Evaluate called for complex ScaleCF in Assemble BilinearForm' from the BFI assembler. Same family as maxwell#3 — both touch the same NGSolve type-check at Assemble time. Verified empirically 2026-06-01; fixture turns the one-shot probe into a regression check.
